meta.sourcePolicy: Official HPA/JPA sources only. This file records 2020 event-level source candidates and must not auto-promote athlete histories into data/database.json.
notes: Temporary 2020 official-source candidate addendum for HPA Event Watch.
Keep separate from athlete master data, confirmed athlete histories, and research candidates.
The linked annual HPA result PDF is an event-level source locator; individual athlete rows require separate identity and row verification before promotion.
2020 source pages are historical official result PDFs; program, outline, entry roster, schedule, live速報, and YouTube links were not promoted unless separately confirmed.

events.name: 第30回 北海道ベンチプレス選手権大会
includedChampionships: 第30回 北海道ベンチプレス選手権大会（フルギア）
第24回 北海道クラシックベンチプレス選手権大会

sources.title: 2020年北海道協会大会結果PDF
sources.evidenceLines: HPA top page year navigation links 2020 to 2020.pdf. PDF pages for 第30回北海道ベンチプレス選手権大会 and 第24回北海道クラシックベンチプレス選手権大会 state 2020年9月20日 and 会場 江別市民体育館.

promotionGuardrails: Use this entry only as an official event source locator.
Bench-only results are not interchangeable with three-lift histories unless the consuming feature explicitly handles event type.
Do not create athlete histories from this file without row-level verification.
Equipped and classic bench labels must remain distinct in any future importer.

sources.title: 2020年北海道協会大会結果PDF
sources.evidenceLines: PDF pages for 2020年度 秋季北海道パワーリフティング選手権大会 state 2020年10月24日-25日 and 会場 江別市民体育館. The result block labels include 第23回北海道クラシックパワーリフティング選手権大会 and 第49回北海道男子（フルギア）.

promotionGuardrails: Use this entry only as an official event source locator.
Do not promote athlete rows into confirmed histories without matching athlete identity, category/class, event date, and PDF row.
Keep equipped and classic divisions distinct when a future importer reads this source.
Do not infer athlete progression comments from this addendum alone.
